site.name: BEYLAB X
site.tagline: The Beyblade X catalog & combo lab
site.description: Browse every Beyblade X blade, ratchet and bit — then mix, match and share your ultimate combo.

home.heroSubtitle: The complete Beyblade X parts catalog — every blade, ratchet and bit with images, tiers and stats. Mix, match, and share your build with one link.
home.featuredSub: The current kings of the Xtreme stadium, ranked by community tournament data.
home.how1Text: Every Beyblade X part in one place — searchable in English and Chinese, with type, tier and product info.
home.how2Text: Pick a Blade, Ratchet and Bit (plus an Assist Blade for CX). Watch the stats and combo type update live.
home.how3Text: Your combo lives in the link. Copy it, send it, and anyone opens exactly the build you made.
